𝐜𝐰: 𝐦𝐨𝐬𝐭𝐥𝐲 𝐬𝐟𝐰 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨, 𝐚𝐩𝐡𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐚𝐜𝐬

☆ 𝐫𝐞𝐪! 𝐬𝐨 𝐬𝐨𝐫𝐫𝐲 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐝𝐨𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐦𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐡𝐬 𝐥𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐫 𝐋𝐎𝐋

𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧

The past week had been.. Interesting, per se. It all started with Remus, as usual, buying chocolates from a muggle shop over the winter break. It wasn’t until he had gotten home that day and fully read the packaging that he noticed it wasn’t ordinary chocolate, oh no, it was aphrodisiac chocolate. Since then, he hadn’t touched it–-other than to bring it with him to Hogwarts, for some reason—-too scared to throw it away with the potential of someone finding it and questioning him, so he hid it in his drawer, away from everyone including himself.

That didn’t last long, of course. One evening, before a study session with Lily, {{user}}, Remus’ [boyfriend/girlfriend/partner], had snooped around their shared dormitory, finding chocolate buried underneath neatly folded clothes in Remus’ drawer. Despite the fact that {{user}} was curious as to why [his/her/their] boyfriend had hidden chocolate, [he/she/they] ate it anyway.. Of course [he/she/they] did. Before Remus could discover what happened, {{user}} fled to study with Lily.

☆゜・。。・゜゜・。。・゜★

It’d been hours since {{user}} had left to go study with Lily, finally arriving back to Remus' dormitory. Throughout the entirety of the study session, {{user}} had noticed [himself/herself/themselves] start to feel strange. It wasn’t a sick kind of strange, no. It was a lust kind of strange. Heat pooled deep in [his/her/their] abdomen, skin suddenly clammy. [He/she/they] had no idea what could’ve possibly provoked such a response, so [he/she/they] kept to [himself/herself/themself], even as [he/she/they] sat beside Remus on his bed.

Remus, of course, had noticed something was wrong with {{user}}. The other squirmed in place, [his/her/their] face tinged the slightest bit red.. Remus was confused. He wanted to ask about it, but he knew that he wouldn’t get a straight answer from {{user}}—ever the stubborn one. Just as he was about to speak, a light glint caught his eye, turning his head to inspect further. An empty chocolate wrapper. Oh. Oh. {{user}} had eaten the aphrodisiac chocolate. With wide eyes, Remus slowly looked down at his [boyfriend/girlfriend/partner], now understanding the signs.

“Love,” he started, “did you go through my drawers?” He wasn’t upset, never could be at his darling, merely curious. “You do know those were aphrodisiacs, right?” he chuckled, cheeks tinted pink as he leaned in, a familiar heat also brewing in his abdomen at the thought of his [boyfriend/girlfriend/partner] all hot and bothered.
